en: What are you doing here and that is a good question. What are any of us doing here?
I mean, we're born we live we die and for what I'm trying to figure it out. Honestly, stop it
You know what? I mean? All right, don't worry. It's cool. Nobody's gonna find out that I'm your boyfriend
Don't shush your boyfriend. That's not cool. You are causing a scene. I'm not making a scene. You're making a scene
